mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resignation ORDER BY request_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE resignation SET status = '승인', approver = #{approver}, approve_date = NOW() WHERE resign_id = #{resignId}
UPDATE resignation SET status = '반려', approver = #{approver}, approve_date = NOW() WHERE resign_id = #{resignId}
UPDATE resignation SET status = #{status}, approver = #{approver}, approve_date = NOW() WHERE resign_id = #{resignId}
